历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1093, 860, 1008, 1338, and 898 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. After a significant drop to 1338 in 2024, it rebounded to 898 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 440 in the past two years, indicating considerable uncertainty in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 898; the university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia for science/physics category was 71 in 2021, 66 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 63 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan is 67 and the medical category plan is 6, totaling 73, an increase of about 15.9% compared to 2025. Expansion means reduced competition pressure, which tends to push rankings backward (increase in number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranked 8th (Top 10) in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a stable ranking of 8-9 in recent years, making it a top comprehensive university in China, with strong and sustained appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management (64 negative out of 99 incidents), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 19th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining attention. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (12 negative incidents), and the concentration of negative public opinion may have a lagging effect on 2026 application psychology. Wuhan University has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including top-level disciplines such as Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, and Geophysics A+. Water Resources Engineering A, Biology A, Chinese Language and Literature A, and Business Administration A are also strong. Computer Science and Technology A- and related electronic information disciplines are strong, aligning with current popular social directions, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high. Wuhan University has a presence in these fields, helping maintain application popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.4% compared to 2025 (about 116,000). Among them, physics category candidates are expected to be about 111,000, significantly expanding the competition base, which puts pressure on rankings to move forward (decrease in number). Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in Central China, with a moderate enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia (60-70 people level), with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 898, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 15.9% (ranking backward), the significant increase in Inner Mongolia candidate numbers of about 32.4% (ranking forward), and the somewhat negative reputation (ranking backward), the expansion and candidate increase offset each other, but the candidate increase is significantly larger than the expansion rate, making intensified competition the dominant force. Considering the competition pressure from the large increase in candidates, a slight forward correction is made, predicting the 2026 minimum ranking for science/physics category to be about 954, with a range of 846-1062.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<846), focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>1062), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors. Although the social popularity of Wuhan University's Law A+ is divided, its disciplinary strength is top-notch and worth focusing on.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Liberal Arts/History Category were approximately 130, 278, 420, 175, and 135 respectively, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing. After a significant drop to 420 in 2023, it rebounded to 175 and 135 in 2024-2025, with a cumulative improvement of 285 places in the last two years, indicating a clear recovery in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 135. The enrollment plan for Liberal Arts/History Category in Inner Mongolia was 18 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. For 2026, the History Category plan is 17, a 15% reduction compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means intensified competition, which pushes the ranking forward (numerical decrease).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 8th (Top 10), with comprehensive strength firmly among the top domestic institutions, exerting strong appeal to Liberal Arts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple campus safety and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 19th on Douyin popularity (high heat), with considerable attention. The 2025 reputation evaluation was clearly negative, and concentrated negative public opinion may have a lagging effect on 2026 application psychology. Wuhan University has outstanding advantages in Liberal Arts: Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A, Journalism and Communication A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Applied Economics A-, etc. Its humanities and social sciences strength ranks among the top in the country, exerting strong appeal to Liberal Arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a hot but divided social popularity; Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is approximately 154,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 43,000, an increase of approximately 32.1% compared to 2025 (about 33,000). The competition base has significantly expanded, putting pressure on rankings to move forward. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the Central China region. Its Liberal Arts enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is about 20 people, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 135, the 15% enrollment reduction in 2026 (ranking forward), the significant increase of about 32.1% in total History Category candidates in Inner Mongolia (ranking forward), and the somewhat negative reputation (ranking backward), the dual superposition of enrollment reduction and candidate increase significantly intensifies competition. Although the somewhat negative reputation has a suppressive effect, the tight supply-demand fundamentals dominate. Considering the combined pressure of a large increase in candidates and enrollment reduction, further forward correction is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Liberal Arts/History Category in 2026 is approximately 108, with a range of 93-123.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Wuhan University's minimum admission rankings for Medicine in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region from 2021 to 2025 were 661 (plan 8), 831 (plan 9), 612 (plan 9), 3927 (plan 11), and 794 (plan 7) respectively. The 2024 ranking was abnormally high (3927) due to the inclusion of the Pharmacy (Science Elite Class) in the medical batch, lowering the overall threshold; the 2025 ranking returned to 794, basically consistent with the fluctuation range (612-831) from 2021 to 2023. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is reduced to 6 (a decrease of 1 from 2025), including 4 for Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and 2 for Clinical Medicine (Taikang Self-Improvement Class). The enrollment reduction exerts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as one of the first batch of Double First-Class construction universities (Class A). Its comprehensive strength ranks among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines leverage the advantages of a comprehensive university, with Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other majors enjoying high reputations, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates in Inner Mongolia.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, with long-term training models such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) particularly favored by candidates. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan City, Hubei Province, a core city in the central China region, with strong regional appeal. The enrollment scale for Medicine in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region is small (only 6 in 2026), and the scarcity further intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical ranking trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's Medicine in 2026 is 741, with a fluctuation range of 711-771. Affected by the reduction in enrollment plan, the ranking has slightly increased (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (794), consistent with the objective law of ranking moving forward under enrollment reduction.

In 2026, Medicine only offers two majors: Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Clinical Medicine (Taikang Self-Improvement Class), both of which are popular long-term training directions with intense competition.
